rows.label: tev023001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev023001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Monica for a hint about collectibles.

rows.label: tev023001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev023001_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Monica about recent developments.

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0001
rows.name:
I'll teach you where to find
some of the collectibles that
I'm asked about most often.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0002
rows.name:
You can find California sunsets west
of Biahno Lake. They can be found
near the cave there sometimes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0003
rows.name:
I hear that spherical EM motors
have been found near Nightglow
Forest's Weeping Whitewood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well? Pretty useful intel right? If I
come across more, I'll let you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0009
rows.name:
I've got a creep of a cousin
who works as a technician at
the maintenance center.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Somehow, he heard that we'd been
struggling with some tough missions.
Then he rang me up and said...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0011
rows.name:
"I'm sure you'll find a way to siphon more NLA money
for BLADE via missions, so try not to waste all the
aid we support staff provide you with next time!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0012
rows.name:
Can you believe that?! If we hadn't
been talking over a comm device, I'd
have punched him in the face![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0013
rows.name:
He thinks he's better than everyone just because
he went to a slightly above-average university.
That guy seriously pisses me off so much...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'll teach you where to find
some of the collectibles that
I'm asked about most often.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0023
rows.name:
Mysterious Nopon stones called "nopoliths" can
occasionally be found in Valley of Oblivion's
Torhogne Plain, or near the Keegan Ridge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0024
rows.name:
Spirit wands are another Nopon collectible.
Apparently they can be found in White Woods's
West Ciel Sandsea and Shivering Sands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0025
rows.name:
Well? Pretty useful intel right? If I
come across more, I'll let you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0026
rows.name:
I'll teach you where to find
some of the collectibles that
I'm asked about most often.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0027
rows.name:
As the name suggests, chameleon sand
can be found in sandy locales like
Valley of Oblivion's Torhogne Plain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0028
rows.name:
And while you're in the area, you can
also find silvery cactaceous resin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0029
rows.name:
If you're looking for Logunie's
driftwood, you can find a ton
of it at Arendt Bridge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0030
rows.name:
To be honest, I learned all of
this from Connor. I just hope
it'll help you do great things![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0016
rows.name:
One of my cousins is a Blue
Blood researcher named Solan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0017
rows.name:
He went to some fancy college, so
he always use to scoff at BLADEs
like me and say we're just pawns.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0018
rows.name:
But lately he's been acting weird. When
I got back from my last mission, he
profusely thanked me for my service.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0019
rows.name:
He even said that he had respect
for the hard work we BLADEs do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0020
rows.name:
I welcome the improvement, but I
wonder what the hell happened to him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023001_MSG0021
rows.name:
Whatever the reason, it's nice to be
able to tolerate his company for once![ST:wait ]
